title: manettia calycosa var. scaberrima
intro: Manettia calycosa var. scaberrima is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a shrub or small tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Manettia calycosa var. scaberrima are attributed to its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Manettia calycosa var. scaberrima can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, and it is also used in traditional remedies as a paste or poultice to treat various health conditions.
